revision.comment: Replace {{[[Template:CatPair|CatPair]]}} or {{[[Template:CatRel|CatRel]]}} with {{[[Template:Navseasoncats|Navseasoncats]]}} (avoid gaps > navbar size & successive name mismatches)
[[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{各世紀の日本}} {{Commonscat}} {{portal|日本}} [[2世紀]]の[[日本]]に関するカテゴリ。 [[Category:2世紀の各国|にほん]] Cate…」
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:2世紀の日本]] [[ar:Category:اليابان في القرن 2]] [[az:Category:II əsrdə Yaponiya]] [[es:Category:Japón en el siglo II]] [[fa:Category:ژاپن در سده ۲ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Japon au IIe siècle]] [[hy:Category:2-րդ դարը Ճապոնիայում]] [[ko:Category:2세기 일본]] [[pt:Category:Século II no Japão]] [[tr:Category:2. yüzyılda Japonya]] [[ur:Category:جاپان میں دوسری صدی]] [[vi:Category:Nhật Bản thế kỷ 2]] [[zh:Category:2世紀日本]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:Yayoi_period]].

{{translated page|ja|Category:2世紀の日本|version=80137675|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ar:Category:اليابان في القرن 2]] [[az:Category:II əsrdə Yaponiya]] [[en:Category:2nd century in Japan]] [[es:Category:Japón en el siglo II]] [[fa:Category:ژاپن در سده ۲ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Japon au IIe siècle]] [[hy:Category:2-րդ դարը Ճապոնիայում]] [[ja:Category:2世紀の日本]] [[ko:Category:2세기 일본]] [[pt:Category:Século II no Japão]] [[tr:Category:2. yüzyılda Japonya]] [[ur:Category:جاپان میں دوسری صدی]] [[vi:Category:Nhật Bản thế kỷ 2]] [[zh:Category:2世紀日本]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]

Text replacement - "[[Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:"
Bot: add [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
{{Portal|Japan}} {{Navseasoncats}}
[[en:Category:2nd century in Japan]][[en:Category:2nd century in Japan]][[en:Category:2nd century in Japan]] [[en:Category:2nd century in Japan]][[en:Category:2nd century in Japan]][[en:Category:2nd century in Japan]] [[en:Category:2nd century in Japan]][[en:Category:2nd century in Japan]][[en:Category:2nd century in Japan]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6316193)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|" to "[[Category:qq|"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Portal|Japan}}
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{wikidata link|Q6316193}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:2nd century in Japan]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:1st millennium in Japan]]
[[Category:2nd century by country|Japan]]
[[Category:Centuries in Japan|02]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=2nd_century_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=2nd_century_in_Japan for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--templates--> {{Portal|Japan}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{wikidata link|Q6316193}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:2nd century in Japan]] <!--categories--> [[Category:1st millennium in Japan]] [[Category:2nd century by country|Japan]] [[Category:Centuries in Japan|02]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25155405060|time triggered pipeline]]
